---
title: CMS Data
alias: &ALIAS cmsgov
href: https://data.cms.gov/
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
  contents: 
    - "../../../../publications/**/*.qmd"
    - "!../../../../publications/_template/"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  include:
    categories: *ALIAS
  fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]

---

## Overview

The Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) data portal provides access to a wide range of healthcare data including Medicare and Medicaid claims, provider data, and quality metrics. It supports research, policy analysis, and public transparency in healthcare delivery.

## Key Features

- **Medicare Claims**: Inpatient, outpatient, and Part D prescription drug data
- **Medicaid Data**: State-level program data and beneficiary information
- **Provider Data**: Physician and hospital performance metrics
- **Open Payments**: Financial relationships between manufacturers and providers
- **Research Data**: Limited datasets available for approved research projects

## Use Cases in Research

- Pharmacoepidemiology and drug utilization studies
- Healthcare cost and utilization analysis
- Hospital readmission and outcomes research
- Antimicrobial prescribing patterns
- Health disparities across payer populations

## Getting Started

Visit [data.cms.gov](https://data.cms.gov/) to explore available datasets and apply for research data access.

## Related Publications

:::{#pubs}
:::
